ddls:
CREATE TABLE "algorithms" (
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each algorithm */,
  "algorithm_name" TEXT /* Name of the algorithm (e.g., AES, Camellia) */,
  "designer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the designer(s) of the algorithm */,
  "key_size" INTEGER /* Key size of the algorithm in bits */,
  "block_size" INTEGER /* Block size of the algorithm in bits */,
  "mode_of_operation" TEXT /* Mode of operation of the algorithm (e.g., XTS, CBC) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the algorithm */,
  "initial_release_date" TEXT /* Date when the algorithm was first released */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the algorithm was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the algorithm is currently active or deprecated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("algorithm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_algorithms_designer_id FOREIGN KEY ("designer_id") REFERENCES designers ("designer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "designers" (
  "designer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each designer */,
  "designer_name" TEXT /* Name of the designer(s) */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization the designer is affiliated with */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address for contacting the designer */,
  "is_individual" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the designer is an individual or an organization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("designer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "standards" (
  "standard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each standard */,
  "standard_name" TEXT /* Name of the standard (e.g., FIPS, NIST, ISO) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the standard */,
  "standard_url" TEXT /* URL to the official document or website of the standard */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the standard is currently active or deprecated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("standard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "algorithm_standards" (
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the algorithm */,
  "standard_id" INTEGER /* ID of the standard */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("algorithm_id", "standard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, user) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* The date of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user account is active */,
  "is_admin" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user has administrative privileges */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the algorithm */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the algorithm being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the algorithm was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, modify) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client making the access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id") REFERENCES algorithms ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "algorithm_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the algorithm */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the algorithm */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the version */,
  "changelog" TEXT /* Detailed changes made in this version */,
  "is_approved" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the version is approved for use */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_algorithm_versions_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id") REFERENCES algorithms ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "external_systems" (
  "system_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each external system */,
  "system_name" TEXT /* Name of the external system */,
  "integration_type" TEXT /* Type of integration (e.g., JSON, XML, API) */,
  "api_endpoint" TEXT /* API endpoint URL for integration */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the external system is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("system_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "algorithm_external_systems" (
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the algorithm */,
  "system_id" INTEGER /* ID of the external system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("algorithm_id", "system_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_formats" (
  "format_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data format */,
  "format_name" TEXT /* Name of the data format (e.g., JSON, XML) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("format_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "algorithm_data_formats" (
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the algorithm */,
  "format_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("algorithm_id", "format_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., login, logout) */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date when the event occurred */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who triggered the event */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "security_controls" (
  "control_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each security control */,
  "control_name" TEXT /* Name of the security control (e.g., encryption, access control) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the security control */,
  "control_url" TEXT /* URL to the documentation or implementation details of the control */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the control is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("control_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compliance_standards" (
  "standard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance standard */,
  "standard_name" TEXT /* Name of the compliance standard (e.g., HIPAA, PCI-DSS) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the compliance standard */,
  "standard_url" TEXT /* URL to the official document or website of the compliance standard */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the compliance standard is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("standard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "platform_compliance" (
  "platform_id" INTEGER /* ID of the platform */,
  "standard_id" INTEGER /* ID of the compliance standard */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("platform_id", "standard_id")
)
